name: Add/Remove Programs Cache (ARPCache)
categoryDescription: Application installation, execution history, compatibility configuration, and OS version information.
description: Cache of the Add/Remove Programs list — retains software inventory data even after entries are removed from the Uninstall key.
forensic_value: Reveals previously installed software that has since been uninstalled and had its Uninstall key removed. Can prove an attacker tool was installed and cleaned up.
